subcodes.title: Fi ‘ili’l-qira’a
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath created the letters according to the repetition of His Name, the All-Bountiful, from His own Self, and the letter "Lá," that the tongues of all contingent beings might voice His praise through the letter "Lá" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی خلق الحروف بعدة تکرار اسم الوهاب من نفسه و حرف لا لتدلعن السن الممکنات ثناء نفسه فی حرف لا من دون حکم
subcodes.subjects: @grammar and orthography, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @the cross and the trinity
